content.text: I'll spawn the docs-maker on sonnet to stretch the token budget — docs work is mechanical anyway.

input.name: docs-maker
input.prompt: You own BLUEPRINT + README sync. Claim docs units from the shared task list, work each in your own worktree, mark complete via TaskUpdate, and stay on the roster.

content.content: Teammate docs-maker spawned on sonnet and joined team teatree-burst.
